introLines.text: Vern, I've been a listener for years. I finally have something worth sharing.
I'm not one to call in, but what I witnessed deserves attention.
I've documented everything. Photos, dates, times. This is real.

detailLines.text: I observed it for several minutes. Enough time to rule out the obvious explanations.
Multiple witnesses corroborated what I saw. Independent accounts, same details.
I've researched similar cases. The pattern is consistent.

defenseLines.text: I've considered every conventional explanation. None of them fit.
I'm a rational person, Vern. This defies rational explanation.

acceptanceLines.text: Thank you. It means a lot to be taken seriously.
That's exactly why I called your show.
I knew your listeners would understand.

extraDetailLines.text: There's more to this story. The follow-up investigation revealed even stranger details.
I've been in contact with others who experienced the same thing. The similarities are uncanny.
What I haven't told you yet is what happened the next day.

conclusionLines.text: I'll send you what I've gathered. People should see this.
Keep doing what you do, Vern. It matters.
I'll keep investigating and report back.
